lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey imp, can you hear me?

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: Of course I can hear ya, ya great big ape. You know, 'veres not even enuf space to swing Bob about in 'ere. How about a breather? You know, stretch me pins for a bit?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'm going to keep you in there. I might keep you as a pet.

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: Pet!! Nah mate. I fink you'd find dat you'd be my pet!! We is not makin good pets.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Really? Why not?

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: Coz...errr...

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: We bite! Yeah we is biting and...and...er...

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: We is fire risk! Yeah dat's it! We be burning down your housey and stealin' all ya shiny gems. Oh, and da beads!! Mmmm, beads.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fire risk? How does that work?

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: Is those wizzies. Dey don't like de imps so dey make us go BOOOM!!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's not that bad. You've got four big windows, charming company...er...

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: Yeah, we's love tiny, crampt space. It be magical. But I is a busy imp, innit? Dragons needin' ticklin', shiny relics needin' stealin', you know how it goes.

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: So, if you's know whas good for ya, you'd be lettin' me go, right?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't I get three wishes?

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: Nah, mate. Dunno what you're chirpin' about.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, you're a magical creature aren't you? Surely I get some wishes for capturing you, or releasing you, or something?

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: I'm finking dat you be a bit confoosed. I is an imp, not some namby-pamby genie or some kinda fairy. Ye can tell by the horns.

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: Sayin' dat, I don't fancy being cooped up like one of me uncle's pigeons. Tell you what, is there anything you need deliverin' to the bank? I may not be no cunjerer or sommink like dat, but I can get about nice

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: an quick like. If you let me scarper, I'll take a couple of fings to the bank for ya. You game?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, that sounds fair.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Surely it should be three items? Then it's one item per wish.

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: I've already told ya, I ain't no bloomin' fairy. Besides, you know wot dey say, three's a crowd innit? I don't fink I can hop about carryin' more dan 2 fings.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got nothing I need banking right now.

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: Great, just blinkin great, dat is. I'll just sit about countin' zombie sheep then. One...two...two and a bit...three and a bit more... I don't fink sheep 'ave dat many legs...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey imp, are you still there?

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: An who's fault is that, eh? EH? I got betta fings to do dan sit ere waitin' for ya. 'Ave ya made up ya mind what else I'm luggin about?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes I have.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'm afraid you're going to have to wait a bit longer.

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: Dat's alright guv'nor. I'll get back to me luvverly dream about beads. Big shiny beads. Love it!

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: Sorry, guv'nor, I seem to 'ave caught meself; I can't do nuffink right now.

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: What use would that be in a bank? You'd be better off leaving it in yer house.

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: Ow! That's hot! Put it in yer bank yerself!

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: No way, I can't bank your looting bag.

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: Nope, between me and you, that toad doesn't look stable.

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: What good is banking that book? Just read it or throw it away!

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: I'm no expert, but when a mushroom glows that much, I'm guessing it's dangerous. Keep it away from me.

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: I'm not touching a gnome ball; that's a vicious game! I might die!

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: Don't you know? You can get into trouble for giving alcohol to minors, and I'm pretty small, it has to be said.

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: There's something weird about those bones; I ain't touching them.

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: It's a flipping stick; why bother banking that? You humans are crazy sometimes.

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: I know what lamps like that contain; I'm not touching it. I might get hurt.

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: Sorry, I'm not going to risk upsetting someone by bundling random holy symbols I don't recognise into bank vaults.

lines.speaker: Imp
lines.text: Hey, if she wants to use the bank, why can't she use her own two legs? Besides, she's too big.
